title: Lamine Yamal set a season record in Barcelona 3-0 Atlético Madrid
fullText: Lamine Yamal set a season record in Barcelona 3-0 Atlético MadridBarcelona star Lamine Yamal conjured up nothing short of a jaw-dropping individual statistic in the club’s latest outing.This came en route to the Blaugrana being dumped out of the Copa del Rey in heartbreaking fashion.AdvertisementBarca marked their return to action a short time ago, welcoming Atlético Madrid to Catalunya’s capital for the 2nd leg of the Copa del Rey semi-final tie between the clubs.When all was said and done, Hansi Flick’s troops emerged on the right side of a 3-0 result.After being put to the sword by four goals in the tie’s opener last month, though, the reigning Copa champions were nevertheless sent packing from the tournament.And yet, along the way, the aforementioned Lamine grabbed the headlines once more.Youngster Lamine was in from the off at the Spotify Camp Nou, from his customary berth on the right flank.AdvertisementAnd across the 90 minutes, the Spanish international nothing short of terrorised Atlético’s backline.As revealed by statisticans Sofascore in the game’s aftermath, in fact, Lamine racked up 14 completed take-ons on Tuesday.The last player to manage as much whilst lining out for a club from one of Europe’s top-5 leagues was the 18-year-old himself, against Inter Milan in the semi-finals of last season’s Champions League:Conor Laird – GSFN
summary: Barcelona star Lamine Yamal conjured up nothing short of a jaw-dropping individual statistic in the club’s latest outing.This came en route to the Blaugrana being dumped out of the Copa del Rey in h...
